description: Run a candidate season manifest through all 6 RUNECHAIN season validators and return a structured pass/fail report. Each gate is checked independently; the overall result is the logical AND of all gates.
prompt_template:
You are validating a candidate RUNECHAIN season manifest against the 6 season gates.

The candidate season JSON is provided below as context:
{{candidate_json}}

The 6 validation gates (from issue #102) are:

1. SCHEMA: All required fields present per game/schema/season.json (meta.id, meta.name, canonState, regions[], towns[], connections[], halvingEffect).
2. REFS: All exits[].to reference existing region IDs; all towns[].regionId reference existing region IDs; halvingEffect.coldHearths are subset of towns[].hearthId.
3. REACHABILITY: BFS from regions[0].id reaches all other regions via connections and exits (treating gated exits as passable for this check).
4. LORE: Each region has a name and tileset; each town has a hearthBrightness in 0–1. At least one region has a hearth entity. Canon is coherent (no contradictory storyBeats).
5. ECONOMY: halvingEffect.coldHearths is non-empty (at least one hearth goes cold per Halving). newPlayerItems does not grant RUNE-denominated power items (Gold/cosmetic only).
6. SEASON_DELTA: The season differs meaningfully from S1 — different dwindlingLevel, at least one new region, or at least one new story beat.

For each gate, produce a result:
  { "gate": "<name>", "pass": true|false, "reason": "<one sentence>" }

Return ONLY a JSON object:
{
  "overall": true|false,
  "gates": [ ...6 gate results... ],
  "summary": "<one paragraph summary of what passed and what needs fixing>"
}
